description: Made of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment to carry a 15.4" laptopOne zipped compartment on the front with organizer pouches and a key-holderOne ear-phones gateOne zipped pocket on the front with an asymmetric opening for enhanced spaceOne zipped side pocketOne mesh bottle holderPadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding applique on the front Back padding for comfort
